intended_use: Viz AAA is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software device for analysis of CTA images of the abdomen. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and vascular or endova
intended_use_full: Viz AAA is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software device for analysis of CTA images of the abdomen. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and vascular or endovascular specialists in workflow triage by flagging and prioritizing studies with suspected abdominal aortic aneurysms during routine patient care.
target_condition: Abdominal aortic aneurysm (infra-renal, fusiform type, ≥3 cm diameter)
ground_truth: Ground truth established by trained radiologists with fellowship in vascular radiology
other_metrics: Performance stratified by site, age, sex, aneurysm location (infra-renal sensitivity 0.97 [0.93, 0.99]), aneurysm diameter (ranging from 0.91 [0.80, 0.97] for 3.0-3.9 mm to 1.00 [0.78, 1.00] for 5.0-5.3 mm), aneurysm type (fusiform 0.97 [0.94, 0.99]), CT scanner manufacturer (GE, Siemens, Toshiba with varying performance), scanner detector rows, slice thickness, imaging protocol (abdomen, abdomen-pelvis, chest-abdomen, chest-abdomen-pelvis), and presence of metal artifact.
